name: Heath Bar Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the brown sugar and sifted flour in a bowl.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Reserve 1 cup of the crumb mixture for topping.
4. In a separate bowl, beat together the egg, milk, baking soda, and vanilla.
5. Add the wet ingredients to the reserved crumb mixture and stir until combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13 inch pan.
7. Sprinkle the chopped pecans, chopped Heath Candy Bars, and reserved crumb mixture evenly over the top of the batter.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 minutes.
9. Allow to cool before cutting into bars.
